css:
<style>
@page {
    size: A4;
    margin: 1cm;
}

@media print {
    .no-print {
        display: none;
    }
}

.page-break {
    page-break-before: always;
}

.final-amount {
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: bold;
}

.urgent {
    color: red;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: bold;
}
</style>
html:
{{ get_shop_name() }}

{{ _("Job Card Receipt") }}

{{ _("Summary") }}: {{ doc.print_summary }}

{{ _("Customer Details") }}

{{ _("Customer") }}: {{ doc.customer_name }}
{{ _("Phone") }}: {{ doc.customer_phone }}

{{ _("Device Details") }}

{{ _("Brand") }}: {{ doc.device_brand }}
{{ _("Model") }}: {{ doc.device_model }}

{% if doc.priority == "Urgent" %}
{{ _("URGENT") }}
{% endif %}

{{ _("Parts Used") }}

{% if doc.parts_used|length > 10 %}
{% endif %} {% set total = 0 %} {% for p in doc.parts_used %} {% set total = total + ((p.quantity or 0) * (p.unit_price or 0)) %} {% endfor %}
{{ _("Part") }} {{ _("Qty") }} {{ _("Price") }} {{ _("Total") }}
{{ p.part_name }} {{ p.quantity }} {{ frappe.format_value(p.unit_price, {"fieldtype": "Currency"}) }} {{ frappe.format_value((p.quantity or 0) * (p.unit_price or 0), {"fieldtype": "Currency"}) }}
{{ _("Total") }} {{ frappe.format_value(total, {"fieldtype": "Currency"}) }}

{{ _("Final Amount") }}: {{ frappe.format_value(doc.final_amount, {"fieldtype": "Currency"}) }}
name: Job Card Receipt
